items.claim: Alessandro Costa has a 100% finish rate in his UFC wins, all by knockout.
items.quote: A 100% finish rate in his wins in the UFC all by knockout.

items.claim: Cody Durden has been finished seven times in his career, including five submissions and two knockouts.
items.quote: Cody Durden's been submitted five times. He's been knocked out two times, so he's been finished seven times.
I think Costa is a little bit chinny in his own right.

items.claim: Zac Reese is extremely hittable and chinny, having been knocked out twice in the first round in the UFC.
items.quote: Zac Reece is extremely hittable. He's very chinny. Zac Reece has been knocked out twice in the UFC in the very first round.

items.claim: John Garza is facing an astronomical step up in competition against Farid Basharat.
items.quote: this is an astronomical step up in competition for John Garza.

items.claim: Farid Basharat will win the fight primarily through his grappling advantage.
items.quote: the problem is the grappling, and that's where Basharat's going to win this fight

items.claim: Damian Pena has next-level power and is 14 years younger than Caeser Almeida.
items.quote: Damian Pena this guy has next level power. He's 14 years younger.

items.claim: Caeser Almeida has never been knocked out but has been hurt multiple times.
items.quote: Caeser Almeida who's never been knocked out, but he's been hurt multiple times.

items.claim: Damian Pena is unproven in the second and third rounds.
items.quote: Pena is still very unproven um when the fight gets into the second third round

items.claim: Tracy Cortez rarely finishes her opponents.
Kai Kamaka has solid volume and wrestling upside.
items.quote: He has solid volume, and he has the wrestling upside here.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt's current fighting style involves low volume and a focus on not getting knocked out rather than winning.
items.quote: Cody Garbrandt these days is is fighting not to win. He's fight He's fighting not to lose. He's fighting to not get knocked out. His volume's pitiful.
